scope_summary.campaign: Active campaign ends in 30 days; double payouts for Core services operating within the main mobile application backend/frontend/APIs.
policy_notes: Do not access arbitrary user accounts or data.
Automated scanning limit stated by program: max 5 requests/second per target host and max 5 parallel requests; current lane did not use scanning.
Auth/authz bypass and serverside information disclosure categories are bounty-relevant.

minimal_contact_summary.mode: single low-speed public landing-page requests with X-<bug-bounty-platform>-Research header; no login, no scanning, no non-owned data access
